_comment: OpenOutreach campaign config for Kamal — house fund goal
_managed_by: Kamil — do not edit manually, use openoutreach-manager.py

campaign.name: Freelance Client Outreach — Django/AI Senior Engineer
campaign.objective: I am Muhammad Kamal, a Senior Backend Engineer with 4+ years experience. I am looking for freelance clients who need Python/Django backend development, AI agent development, or AWS infrastructure work. I want to connect with CTOs, Engineering Managers, Founders, or Product Leads at tech startups, SaaS companies, EdTech platforms, or any company building AI-powered products. Budget range: $35-60/hr or $800-5000 fixed projects.
campaign.target_market: CTOs, VPs of Engineering, Engineering Managers, Founders, or Technical Co-founders at: (1) SaaS startups needing backend engineers, (2) EdTech companies building LMS or teacher tools, (3) Companies building AI agents or automation workflows, (4) Companies using Django/Python who need senior help, (5) Companies wanting to integrate Claude/LLMs into their products. Company size: 5-200 employees. Stage: Seed to Series B. Location: US, UK, Canada, Australia, or remote-first anywhere.

message_templates.connection_request: Hi {{first_name}}, I'm a Senior Backend Engineer (Django/Python/AWS) who also builds AI agents. Saw your work at {{company}} — looked interesting. Happy to connect.
message_templates.follow_up_1: Thanks for connecting {{first_name}}! Quick question — is {{company}} ever looking for senior Django/Python help on a contract basis? I've been building production systems at 10K+ DAU scale and recently got deep into AI agent development. Happy to share more if there's a fit.
message_templates.follow_up_2: Hey {{first_name}}, following up in case my last message got buried. I specialise in Django backends, AWS infrastructure, and AI agent development (Claude API). If {{company}} ever has a backend challenge or an AI project that needs a senior engineer, I'd love to hear about it. No pressure either way.
message_templates.follow_up_3: Hi {{first_name}}, last message from me — I promise! If the timing isn't right now, feel free to reach out when it is. I'm at oyekamalkhan@gmail.com. Wishing {{company}} well.

kamal_profile.name: Muhammad Kamal
kamal_profile.title: Senior Backend Engineer | Python • Django • AWS • AI Agents
kamal_profile.headline_achievement: 40% latency reduction, zero-downtime migrations on millions of rows, 10K+ DAU production system at Taleemabad
